title: HTML Fundamentals
description: Test your knowledge of HTML5 tags, semantics, forms, and accessibility.

title: CSS Mastery
description: Questions on selectors, specificity, Flexbox, Grid, and responsive design.

title: JavaScript Deep Dive
description: ES6+, closures, prototypes, async/await, and DOM manipulation.

title: Database Concepts
description: SQL queries, normalization, indexing, transactions, and NoSQL basics.

title: Computer Networking
description: HTTP, TCP/IP, DNS, OSI model, REST APIs, and web security basics.
